summary: Comprehensive testing of Trade Circle Central Bank features: AI Merchant, Escrow, Cosmic Broker, and hidden Dev Console. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified for all 6 tabs (Browse, Broker, Escrow, My Listings, Offers, Karma), wallet display, credit packs, merchant catalog, sell back panel, escrow dashboard, and hidden Dev Console triple-tap feature.
seed_data_creation: User seeded with 48 credits, 800 dust, 100 gems
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Circle Central Bank features fully working. Backend endpoints: /api/trade-circle/wallet (returns credits/dust/gems), /api/trade-circle/broker/packs (4 credit packs), /api/trade-circle/ai-merchant (8 catalog items), /api/trade-circle/ai-merchant/buy, /api/trade-circle/ai-merchant/sell, /api/trade-circle/broker/buy-credits (Stripe checkout), /api/trade-circle/escrows, /api/trade-circle/escrow/create, /api/trade-circle/escrow/ship, /api/trade-circle/escrow/confirm-receipt, /api/trade-circle/escrow/dispute. Frontend: 6 tabs working (Browse, Broker, Escrow, My Listings, Offers, Karma). Cosmic Broker shows wallet strip (48 credits, 800 dust, 100 gems), 4 credit packs (Spark $0.99, Ember $4.99, Flame $9.99, Inferno $24.99), 8 merchant items, sell back panel. Escrow Dashboard shows state filters (All, Committed, In Transit, Complete, Disputed), New Escrow button, create escrow modal with 5% Resonance Fee calculation. Hidden Dev Console appears after triple-tapping nav logo - shows Perf Grade, Avg Latency, API Calls, System Status, Escrow Pipeline stats.

backend_endpoints.ai_merchant: GET /api/trade-circle/ai-merchant - returns 8 catalog items with user balances
backend_endpoints.escrow_create: POST /api/trade-circle/escrow/create - creates escrow with resonance fee

frontend_tabs.browse: Trade listings grid with search and category filters (All, Readings, Healing, Guidance, Meditation, Crafted, Goods, Services)
frontend_tabs.broker: Cosmic Broker with wallet strip, 4 credit packs, 8 merchant items, sell back panel
frontend_tabs.escrow: Shipping Bridge with state filters, New Escrow button, create escrow modal
frontend_tabs.offers: Received Offers and Sent Offers sections
frontend_tabs.karma: Karma Leaderboard, Karma Tiers guide, How to Earn Karma section

hidden_dev_console.metrics: Perf Grade (A), Avg Latency (59ms), API Calls count
hidden_dev_console.sections: System Status, Escrow Pipeline, Recent API Calls, JS Heap
